dj_text: Stein Bagger has passed. Suspekt & Folkeklubben - Danmark awaits.
commercial_text: This break was supposed to be an ad but we forgot to sell one. So here's 10 seconds of me making mouth noises. mmm.
hijack_text: Bingo Night Radio from the Eternal Community Center!
recovery_text: Someone is LEAKING our frequency to other kosmos. I have suspects. It's all of you.
title: Suspekt & Folkeklubben - Danmark
